preamble: Epenthesis of [g] is used to resolve vowel hiatus, particularly in Mongolian where [g] is inserted between adjacent vowels in grammatical suffixes. It also appears in language games across various languages.

examples.note: [g] inserted between vowel-final stem 'duu' (song) and vowel-initial instrumental suffix '-aar' to resolve hiatus.
Language game (not natural phonology): [g] + vowel copy inserted after each syllable; illustrates productive [g]-insertion as a ludling strategy.
